programme.title: Dame Dash
programme.desc: Dame Dash, co-founder of Roc-A-Fella records and the producer who discovered Jay-Z and Kanye West, reveals the lessons he's learnt from his triumphs and successes as a hip hop and rap legend within the music industry.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Shawn Mendes Reveals a New Side of Himself While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the 19-year-old pop phenom reps his Canadian roots while taking on the wings of death. Along the scorched road, Mendes addresses everything from Justin Bieber's hockey skills to guitar store etiquette.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Philip DeFranco Sets a YouTube Record While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As they fend off the Scoville onslaught, Sean and Philip get into the weeds of YouTube history, unpackage the problems with contemporary media and reveal photographic evidence of a bygone era when Sean actually had a six-pack.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Trick Daddy Prays for Help While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the Miami rap legend takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from partying with Jeremy Shockey to hip-hop's enduring love affair with Benihana.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tyra Banks Cries for Her Mom While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: In between "America's Next Top Model" anecdotes and expert breakdowns of the modeling industry, Ty Ty drops a fire rap verse, critiques Sean Evans' head shots, stress-eats ice cream, strikes hot sauce-inspired poses and so much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: John Mayer Has a Sing-Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Mayer goes toe to toe with the wings of death, tackling anything and everything along the way: Justin Bieber's melody wizardry, the best guitar faces in history, his obsession with Visvim, the musicality of Dave Chappelle's comedy and much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Johnny Knoxville Gets Smoked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Jackass alum has been gored by bulls and shot in the chest, but can he survive the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Natalie Portman Pirouettes in Pain While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As the Scoville bombs rain down on her tongue, Portman discusses her beloved "SNL" rap performances, her Harvard days and why it's cool that Kanye used ballet dancers in his 'Runaway' music video.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Marques Brownlee Ranks Hot Sauce Labels While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: During the spice storm, Marques Brownlee breaks down his pro Ultimate Frisbee career, offers sensible headphone advice and provides some scorching breakfast-cereal takes.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tom Segura Tears Up While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Eventually, Segura ends up with tears streaming from his eyes but is it the hot sauce or the tender words from BFF Bert Kreischer? Find out in this scorching new episode of "Hot Ones."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Joji and Rich Brian Play the Newlywed Game While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: With their debut album about to drop, Joji and Rich Brian share behind-the-scenes stories and test their friendship with some "Newlywed Game"-style questions on Da Bomb.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Wiz Khalifa Gets Smoked Out By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: O.G. smoker Wiz Khalifa tries to avoid blowing his high on the wings of death. As he and Sean Evans crank up the heat, Wiz breaks down his weed Olympics with Snoop Dogg and discusses his love for the Diplomats.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Michael Cera Experiences Mouth Pains While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Issa Rae Raps While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As she battles the wings of death, Issa breaks down millennial dating terms, explains how she may have inspired Cardi B and graces the "Hot Ones" stage with one of its most memorable musical performances.

programme.desc: Flex tells Arsenal fan Pippa Monique that United's starting XI is better than Arsenal's.The pair debate the biggest arguments between the two classic Premier League rivals, including who will finish higher in the Premier League this season.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: The Goat
programme.desc: Expressions Oozing and Cecil Jee Thomas of ‪AFTVmedia‬ went head-to-head in a winner-stays-on tournament to pick the best young player currently in the Premier League, discussing talented players like Cole Palmer, Bukayo Saka and Kobbie Mainoo.

programme.title: The Goat
programme.desc: Miles and Stevo the Mad Man go head-to-head to debate who is the Premier League's greatest ever midfielder out of legends including Steven Gerrard, Frank Lampard, Kevin De Bruyne and Patrick Vieira.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we hear from Stuart Wingford Taylor about his remarkable life inside the UK's most notorious prisons. Throughout his 24 years as a high-security prison officer, Stuart has come face-to-face with some of Britain's most notorious criminals, including Joanna Dennehy, Eunice Spry and Michael Stone. He tells us about the deadly homemade weapons inmates fashion out of soap and toothbrushes, prisoners' plots to murder guards and the gang violence that runs one London jail.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This week, we spoke to Nick Dunn, who was wrongly imprisoned in Indian jails for four years. Nick was part of a shipping crew defending his boat from Somali pirates in the Indian Ocean when a cyclone threat forced them to dock off the coast of India. After being arrested on false weapons charges, Nick and his crewmates spent four torturous years in 'hellish' conditions, facing abuse from the prisoners and prison officers.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode, we spoke to intrepid explorer Benedict Allen who has nearly died nine times throughout his career - including when he was threatened by gold miners, contracted deadly malaria and was shot at by Pablo Escobar's hitmen. Benedict relives his experience of becoming the first person to cross the Amazon Basin and getting lost alone in the rainforest for weeks without food, shelter or water. This desperate situation led him to make one of the toughest decisions of his life and moulded him into the explorer we meet today.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we hear from the remarkable Sosa Henkoma who survived being groomed by a South East London drugs gang as a child. To escape abuse at home, Sosa ran away and was first introduced to county lines drug dealing as an 11-year-old. He found himself at the centre of a war between two rival gangs, that led to him being shot, stabbed and ironed on the chest as a young teenager. After years of brutal gang violence, Sosa finally received support as a survivor of child trafficking and grooming. He now uses his voice to help young people and educate law enforcement on preventing grooming and child exploitation.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Sinners star Hailee Steinfeld tries British and American treats, finding her new obsession in Hobnobs, calling them an instant favourite. As for Peeps? It's a hard no. Tune in to see which country's snacks reign supreme. Afrobeats megastar Davido joins LADbible's Snack Wars for the ultimate taste test... And things get spicy! Watch as he puts British and Irish snacks head-to-head with Nigerian favourites, and trust us, he doesn't hold back.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Shaboozey joins us to compare British and American snacks! He falls in love with Maltesers, spits out Milk Duds, explains why the PB&J is the ultimate staple of American cuisine, and finishes it all off with a double shot of whiskey.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: UFC Star Alexander Volkanovski joins us for Snack Wars: UK v Australia. The fighter reveals the proper way to eat TimTams, faces off with the legendary Vegemite, and tries some UK flavours like Gentleman's Relish and pickled onion Space Raiders. Former footballers, Real Madrid Galáctico star Roberto Carlos and Arsenal Invincible player Gilberto Silva, try Pimm's for the first time with Caipirinha cocktails, compare British and Brazilian beer and share their love for Frazzles and Torresmos.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Minnesota Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson joins us for a hilarious game of Snack Wars: UK v USA. The NFL superstar tries Marmite for the first time, hates on UK cheese and explains his love for cookies. British kids try American food for the first time in this episode of Snack Wars: Kids! Harvey and Lyla try all sorts of treats, from KSI and Logan Paul's PRIME drink to a classic McDonald's Egg McMuffin. It's UK vs US, but who will come out on top?

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald

programme.title: Mafia Women With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald returns to the world of the Mafia, this time gaining unprecedented access to the wives, daughters and girlfriends of notorious gangsters. In these two compelling, emotionally rich films, Trevor discovers how the choices these women have made affects their lives today and how those who grew up around the mob bear the scars of their father's actions.

programme.title: Mafia Women With Trevor McDonald

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Duel on the Nile: In the first episode of the three-part series, The Biblical Plagues, scholars deal with the first six natural disasters. In the Nile, scientists discovered deadly microorganisms that caused the fish to die and a stress situation among the frog population.

programme.title: How the Romans Changed the World
programme.desc: The Romans created one of the greatest empires in history, built with the help of an incredible army of professional legionnaires and a well-oiled political machinery. At its height, a few hundred men ruled over a fifth of mankind and an area stretching from Britain to Syria and from Gibraltar to the Euphrates. They undertook some of the most ambitious building-projects of their time: endless roads, gigantic bridges and imposing aqueducts formed a complex infrastructure and left a lasting legacy. This film is a revelatory and unique journey into the world of ancient Rome.

programme.title: The Rise to Power
programme.desc: At the end of a bloody civil war, Francisco Franco seized power and ruled Spain with an iron hand for nearly four decades. Under his leadership the conservative, monarchist armed forces staged a coup against Spain's republican government which had been democratically elected.

programme.title: FALLBACK
programme.desc: No information

programme.title: The Limes, Season 1
programme.desc: The Limes, Season 1 - Danger on the Roman Frontier: Was the Limes Rome's "iron curtain", its bulwark against the barbarians? Along the Limes military camps evolved into flourishing villages, protected by an impressive boundary and the Roman legions. But how endangered were these cities? How did the Limes hold against the attacks from tribes from the north?

programme.title: The Limes, Season 1
programme.desc: The Limes, Season 1 - Fortification against the Barbarians: Warships secured the river borders formed by the Rhine and the Danube. The palisades, walls, trenches and forts of the Limes on land stretched across Germania, the wild "Barbaricum." The Limes was a bulwark that ran from northern Britain all the way to the Black Sea.

programme.title: Mission behind the Iron Curtain
programme.desc: During the Cold War, tensions between East and West mount alarmingly. In consequence, western intelligence services shift their focus on East Germany as the Warsaw Pact's major deployment zone. Among those send forth are so-called travel spies, basically amateurs, as well as the professionals with the military missions.

programme.title: War in the Shadows
programme.desc: At the outset of the 80s, the Soviet army is universally modernized. The renovation of its armored divisions is well underway, observed closely by western military intelligence in East Germany. At center stage: their T 80 tanks and Mil Mi-28 combat helicopters. Weapons-scouts in the field are not the only ones constantly on active duty at that time, however.

programme.title: S1 E10 Asteroids
programme.desc: Giant mountain-sized boulders from space have wrought death and destruction.

programme.title: S1 E13 The Alps

programme.title: S2 E1 Grand Canyon
programme.desc: The Grand Canyon is nearly 300 miles long and over a mile deep.

programme.title: Pythons and the Exotic Pet Trade
programme.desc: For those of us that long to escape the rat race the pull of the wild can be strong. Whether we're risking our lives with extreme sports, following our animal passions or just taking a walk on the wild side, the natural world calls to us. What's more, the power of nature tests our limits, opens our eyes and heals our hearts in equal measure. So why try to resist such a beautiful, exciting and enlightening siren song? Perhaps there's nothing better for us humans than to follow the pull of the wild.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Lions Rule
programme.desc: On the African plains lions rule. They're not the biggest or fastest animals around, but stealth, teamwork and the strength of the pride means they almost always come out on top.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Pythons and the Exotic Pet Trade
programme.desc: For those of us that long to escape the rat race the pull of the wild can be strong. programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: The Provence coast
programme.desc: The Provence is famed for its endless fields of laven-der, but this lush landscape also has a beautifully mari-time touch: The Côte Bleue! Small, hidden beaches, charming harbour towns, imposing, craggy bays and a uniquely clear light that has attracted painters includ-ing Cézanne and Braque. The coast derives its name from the deep blue water and extends from Marseille to Martigues. This small town is also known as "The Ven-ice of the North", as it is shaped entirely by water: an inland lake, the sea itself, as well as a connecting canal. In the bays of the Calanques, the steeply-walled coastal inlets in the Mediterranean limestone, Lionel Franc is a cliff diver. His personal record is a hight of 36 metres! Ambi is a sculptress. This young artist's work, who moved to Marseille from Madagascar many years ago, is characterised by a dynamic momentum. As a pas-sionate pétanque player, she demonstrates this drive on the boules courts of the port city. John Pendray is Pein-tre officiel de la Marine, an official marine painter. The French state allows just 40 painters to its circle. There are no monetary rewards, but heaps of honour and a very smart uniform!

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: "Cleaning woman island", concrete castles, Ballermann: Mallorca's image is negatively affected in some respects. The documentary explores the charm of the largest Balearic island beyond the hustle and bustle of tourism and Rambazamba. The "real" Mallorca is best explored through real Majorcans: Manolo Barahona, TV fishing expert from the local island broadcaster IB3, faces the most difficult task of the year. The Raor is in season, the most expensive fish on the island. Manolo is supposed to get him first in front of the camera and then in the pan. There's only one catch, the little fish with the piranha teeth just doesn't want to be on TV. In the first months of the year Mallorca turns into a sea of almond blossoms. There are around seven million almond trees on the island, once planted to replace dead vines. But now also the almond trees are threatened. The fire bacterium continues to spread, especially on the large plantations. The farmer Biel Torrens wants to save Mallorca's almond trees and fruit with a small organic plantation and gentle harvesting methods. He shakes the almonds from the tree by hand instead of using a mechanical vibrator.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The light of the Balearic island of Ibiza is magical and its trademark: The "Island of Light" is tiny compared to its sister island Mallorca, but offers the most beautiful sunsets in the world. That's what they say. They attract sun worshippers and party people from near and far. To the sounds of the famous "Balearic Sound" they turn night into day. This documentary documents the island in the balancing act between luxury yachts and traditions. Hippie culture, celebrities, pine forests, bays with turquoise water and villages with bright white houses: Ibiza has many faces. Mora (80) and Djin (67) have been drawn to the island for 55 years. They are the uncrowned kings of the hippies. But only love, light, air and laziness, these times are also long gone on Ibiza. Mora knits sexy jerseys for young hippies from morning till night. Djin helps her sell at the famous Las Dalias hippie market and works as a construction worker: chilling and no pension in sight. The virgin Carmen is the patron saint of the sailors. On her day of honour, a mass is celebrated in the port city of Eivissa. Afterwards, fishermen carry the Virgin through the narrow streets of Ibiza City down to the quay. And then Carmen sets sail. Several places on Ibiza claim to offer the most beautiful sunset in the world: In front of Cala de Benirrás, the sun sinks right next to the iconic rock Cap Benat, which the locals awefully call "God's Finger". The typical soft beats over the sea sound from almost all the bays and provide deep relaxation worldwide under the term "Balearic Sound". Some of the famous DJs are jetting around the globe for huge fees. But in the small beach bars, the Chiringuitos, the island sound is celebrated further. On the beach of Cala Salada the Brit Joe Burnley has the command over a troop of mermaids. The ladies squeeze into the tight mermaid costume for the good cause. With great grace they swim towards yachts that are forbidden to anchor on sea grass meadows. Charming but unyielding, they point out the offence to the captain and crew a creative environmental action to save the endangered Neptune gas, green lung of the sea and habitat for Ibiza's seahorses. The underwater photographer Manu San Felix is also committed to the endangered seahorses. Using a probe, he maps the coastal area around Ibiza and feeds the data into a GPS app. No skipper should be able to say that he didn't even know that his anchor was clawing into Neptune grass. On land, Manu is dedicated to breeding seahorses. His plan: He wants to expose the animals in the Mediterranean to Ibiza and Formentera in order to secure their population. Garages on the beach? Many bays on the island still have Casetas Varadero, boat garages threatened with decay. Fishermen once built them illegally. The picturesque sheds are therefore only tolerated, but may no longer be restored. The 83-year-old Toni Salvado still drives straight out to sea from his garage. He fishes for his own needs and a few friends, he is

programme.title: Menorca
programme.desc: Not nearly as crowded as Majorca or Ibiza: Menorca has noticeably fewer visitors than her sister islands and in 1993, was recognised by UNESCO as a biosphere re-serve. Menorca also has its own distinctive charm, with its secluded coves, mighty cliffs, beautiful gardens and ages old towns and villages. Its residents love the is-lands treasures and peculiarities. Forests make up al-most a third of Menorca, complemented by many lush green meadows. Next to tourism, agriculture is a major source of the island's income to the present day. On Menorca, there are several accumulations of enormous megalithic stones. From a global point of view, the up to five-metre-tall "Taulas", whereby the stones are ar-ranged in the shape of a "T", are unique.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Santorini archipelago is a gem, but is located on a veritable powder keg. It is only a matter of time before the volcano, the crater rim of which gave us this island world, erupts again. Since January 2011, threatening rumblings have been perceived beneath the archipelago. On Santorini, it's a case of getting nowhere fast without a mule. Whether the restaurant terraces above the abyss of Oia, the hotels on the breath-taking cliffs of Imerovigli or Firostefani, it was only with the help of the stubborn climbing artists, that these daring constructions were made possible. Antonis Vlachos has ten strong mules that work for him. He transports almost everything with them: stones, food or the typically blue paint for the church domes. Santorini is a tourist magnet and up to five cruise ships call in at the islands daily. However, there is no port, just a narrow, concrete quay. Without the tender boats, no guests would ever reach the shore.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The Blue and White Island World of Greece: Mykonos, Naxos and Tinos
programme.desc: Around the once sacred Isle of Delos, some 200 islands, including 20 larger ones, are arranged almost in a circle. This is where the name of the Greek island paradise comes from: Cyclades, a derivation of the Greek word kýklos, circle. Each cyclade has a unique character. The pelican Petros, about 20 years old, is the mascot of Mykonos. He moves from taverna to taverna all day long, scrounging fish. This works out sometimes well and sometimes not so well. Petros does have a few human friends who regularly slip him something, but all too often visitors eager to take pictures block his path. Then he has to "wiggle" his way through the crowd. Jackie Onassis is said to have once brought Petros' "great-grandmother" from Louisiana to the island.

programme.title: The Turkish Riviera
programme.sub-title: The flair of antiquity and a turquoise sea
programme.desc: With a coastline boasting miles of bathing beaches, turquoise waters, breath-taking cliffs whilst being steeped in history, the Turkish riviera was even a fa-vourite of the Ancient Greeks, Romans and Ottomans, who all loved the mild climate and the lush landscape. Near the ruins of the ancient city of Side, Menderes Akdemir works on the latest attraction aimed at Riviera holidaymakers: his spooky pirate ship "Big Kral" is due to leave dry dock and head for the sea. Mehmet Özata came up with a very clever idea: to be able to cope with the basically ruinous puffer fish plague along the coastline, he produces a selection of leather utensils made of their skin. The islands that surround the sunk-en city of Simena are hugely popular, despite the very modest infrastructure and lack of shopping facilities. This is why Fatma and Ahmet Mazili have transformed their small rowing boat into a floating snack bar. An-other gap in the market was brought to life by Ufuk Secgin. He came up with the idea of providing Halal Holidays, vacations that conform to Islam. For Muslims to be able to relax on holiday, much has to be well organised, with a copy of the Koran and a prayer rug seen as the absolute minimum requirements

programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O'Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After 11 months and 14 competitions all over the world, it all comes down to the final in this episode. The strongmen must show their best skills and every mistake is expensive, so their concentration must be at the highest possible level. Will Krzysztof manage to take off back or will Dainis maintain his lead?

programme.desc: Pingu and Robby discover 'fish tennis'. Pingu and his friend go tobogganing. Pingu and his friends have a hockey match. The two penguin children try everything in order not to have to go to bed.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu admires a penguin friend's fantastic, new skis. Pingu is in a terrible mood. Pingu and his friend decide to build an igloo. Pingu pulls an accordion out of the toy chest.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friend get trapped in an ice tunnel. Pingu and two friends meet for a toboggan race. Pingu has to rush to the loo because he has drunk too much. Robby slips into the school ice-hole.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Grandfather is sick! Pingu, his sister, and Robby play at putting on a circus. Pingu feels sorry for the poor organ grinder. Pingu's and his friends play ball and do not notice how loud they are.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu hurts his beak while playing. At school, Pingu is irritated to find the new girl penguin seems to have taken a shine to him. Pingu is plagued by a mischievous seagull. Pingu goes ice surfing.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pingi want to have their first kiss. Pingu and Robby are curling. Pingu and his family are preparing for Christmas. Pingu and his friends, Hugo and Robby, are playing hide-and-seek.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his sister practise cooking. Pingu goes to see his aunt who lives in another village. Pingu is playing at being a photographer. Pingu and his sister need help from their parents.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to give his Grandfather a big birthday present. Pingu proudly presents his magic tricks. Pingu celebrates his birthday with his friends. Pingu goes to the fairground with his family.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the task of looking after the twins. Pingu has some bad luck while bowling. Pingu and his friend play practical jokes using a fish on a string. Father drives over Pingu's sister's toy pram.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu visits his injured sister in hospital. The class outing takes them to see a sculptor. Pingu accompanies his sister to the nursery. Only Pingu is curious when strangers pass through the village.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Mother and Father would like to go to a concert. Pingu and his sister help with the tedious household chores. Pingu, his sister, and Robby build an enormous snowman. Pingu plays with wooden blocks.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friend go cross-country skiing. Pingu and Robby get up to all sorts of mischief. Pingu and his sister only want to eat fish and cake for supper. Pingu plans to set off on an expedition.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu doesn't want to go to school and so pretends he is ill. Pingu is inspired to be a painter. Pingu helps his neighbour and is rewarded for his kindness. A seagull steals Pingu's fish.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friends catch a bottle containing a map. Pingu and his sister take the record player outside. They break Mother's vase. A classmate throws a paper aeroplane and Pingu gets the blame!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend, Pingo, teases him. Pingu is supposed to be looking after his neighbour's egg. Pingo has a brand-new toy car. Pingu plays Superman with his friend, Pingo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his two friends want to have a fishing competition. Pingu sees a letter on the table. Robby and a friend want to play badminton without Pingu! Pingu wants to try his luck at drawing lots.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: United as Bruticus, the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari's attempt to use her Key on herself ends in disaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron seizes the Autobots' ultimate weapon to attack Prime and his crew.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead must protect Detroit from the Constructicons' plot to control the city's oil supply.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Elite Guard returns as an old enemy seeks revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base and attempt to take the other two minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Team Prime splits off in a race to beat Megatron to the next four Iacon relics.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The second of the relic hunts takes Optimus Prime to the Antarctic.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The disabling of Soundwave's deployer creates a unique opportunity for Ratchet and Wheeljack.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The final relic proves deadlier to Bulkhead than the Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tick Tock Smurfs: The village of the Smurfs used to live without a clock. But now suddenly time becomes a precious commodity and Brainy Smurf designs a schedule to take advantage of the new Village clock... Can the Smurfs survive the attacks of time?

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Futuresmurfed
programme.desc: Balthazar the Enchanter is a man of vision. He knows that the times of alchemy are drawing to their end. The future belongs to those who will understand science...but how can he see into the future? Perhaps by kidnapping Father Time. The Smurfs will help to put things right after Little Thunder, a dinosaur, escapes through a gash in the fabric of time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Comet Is Coming!: Papa's note to the Smurfs about viewing a comet is delivered torn. The Smurfs read only the first part and think their world is coming to an end. They plan how to spend their last day until Papa returns to clear up the misunderstanding and assure them that they are safe.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfily Ever After: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Colour Smurf
programme.desc: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Rose: Smurfette promises Mother Nature that if she creates a blue rose Smurfette will never cut it. But when the white rose becomes blue, Smurfette becomes white. The only way to make Smurfette blue again is for her to cut the rose. She reluctantly cuts the rose, returning nature to normalcy and learning that one cannot always keep a promise.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Paradise Smurfed: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more.

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sweepy Smurf: Sweepy the chimney sweep Smurf is not the most popular inhabitant of the Village of the Smurfs. He is rather messy, and the clouds of soot that he makes certainly don't add to his popularity. Only the Smurflings find him great company as he's the only one who can get dirty and not be told off. Yet in their enthusiasm for Sweepy, the Smurflings endanger the Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Last Smurfberry: Papa Smurf organizes a crew to sail to Smurfberry Island because Gargamel has killed all of the trees except one to trap the Smurfs. Gargamel follows them, but once more fails to catch them because the Witch of Smurfberry Island sends her nose-eating seagulls after them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Marco Smurf And The Pepper Pirates: The Smurfs sail off in their sailing boat to save Marco Smurf, who has been captured at sea by Captain Pepper. Marina and a dolphin help to free Marco.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Float Full Of Smurfs: The Smurfs must find a bunny family to pull their float in the Autumn Carnival. Gargamel sees his chance to capture the little blue people and disguises himself as a giant bunny. Is he going to catch all the Smurfs in one fell swoop?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Rabbids in Santa's country.
programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: The Rabbids are on a mission.
programme.desc: Two rabbids play a bowling game using penguins as bowling pins.

programme.title: Dr Mad Rabbid is out of control!
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid has found a great way to become invisible, now he just needs a guinea pig to test it.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: Smile, Rabbids!
programme.desc: When a family tries to take a nice picture at a wedding ceremony, the Rabbids ruin everything.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: Super Rabbids to the rescue
programme.desc: Beware ! The three rabbids with super powers have the worst plan to get to the moon!

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!
programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a robot coach -- the "Coachnik", to put S and G through a "Training Camp" to improve their skills. Then Coachnik puts a bomb in Grounder's head as a booby trap for Sonic, and a football game ensues with Grounder's head as the ball.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner, named Bert Whoo, when Robotnik uses his henchbots to try to collect protection money. When the henchbots prove to be no match for Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts inadvertantly creates a "super power" formula, when his janitor bucket spills in the lab. Robotnik falls into it and becomes "Super Robotnik", then challenges Sonic to a fight, with all of Mobius as the stakes. With Prof. Von...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When outlaws chase a sheriff out of a western town, Sonic takes over. But the outlaws are robots built by Robotnik. And when they capture a pretty possum of a saloon girl, Sonic meets Robotnik for a showdown.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: First in a four-part Time Travel series. Robotnik invents a time machine to go back in time and gather four powerful gemstones. His first attempt is on the high seas, but Sonic goes into hyper-Sonic-overdrive, and reverses time to go after him. ...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: SONIC X Sonic's Scream Test
programme.desc: Chris' mother Lindsey is shooting a movie in an old castle and Sonic and his friends are there to visit as well. However, they begin to notice that something is amiss as ghostly figures begin to appear.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Orangutango
programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: SONIC X Cruise Blues
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Double Date Trouble
programme.desc: Donkey Kong tries have lunch with Candy on her day off and watch a movie with Diddy at the same time. He also has to get Bluster to replace some of the booby traps around the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Cranky's Tickle Tonic
